title: cynoglossum biebersteinii
intro: Cynoglossum biebersteinii, also known as Bleeding Fingers or Gypsy Flower, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to the Caucasus and parts of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Cynoglossum biebersteinii include its use in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Cynoglossum biebersteinii is often prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal purposes, and can also be found in some herbal supplements and teas.
